guard_strings.findings_guard: Allowed findings.type values: "fact", "hypothesis", "risk". Do not invent values like "gap".
guard_strings.artifacts_guard: artifacts must be an array of objects with stable keys. Allowed artifacts[].type values: "patch", "command_result", "test_result", "report", "log", "screenshot".
guard_strings.artifact_example: Copy this artifacts object shape when you have one: {"type":"patch","path":"runs/<run_id>/attempts/<attempt_id>/artifacts/diff.patch"}
guard_strings.plain_string_guard: Do not return artifacts as plain strings like "artifacts/diff.patch".

evidence_chain.value: Allowed findings.type values: "fact", "hypothesis", "risk". Do not invent values like "gap".
artifacts must be an array of objects with stable keys. Allowed artifacts[].type values: "patch", "command_result", "test_result", "report", "log", "screenshot".
旧内存态派发了这次 execution
Allowed findings.type values: "fact", "hypothesis", "risk". Do not invent values like "gap".
artifacts must be an array of objects with stable keys. Allowed artifacts[].type values: "patch", "command_result", "test_result", "report", "log", "screenshot".

Do not return artifacts as plain strings like "artifacts/diff.patch".

replay_commands.purpose: 验证当前 worker prompt 模板和坏写回护栏
验证 runtime source drift 与 post-restart prompt 证据链
验证 restart_required 不会被自动续跑越过
